saas_status.details: 12 API routes, 13 DB tables, 9 migrations. Hono/Drizzle/Neon. No frontend. No auth impl. No deployment config.

projections_eos_status.details: 10 department agents, 3 workflows, 3 views, entity hierarchy, complete Postgres integration layer. Most developed projection.

EOS.canonicality_assessment: DIVERGENT — /opt/OS/saas is partial backend with v2 schema; projections/eos/integration uses v1 schema. Windows Beast likely has full app. Cannot determine canonical source without inspecting all locations.
